description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of Gibs Tikka Macaroni Pasta, predominantly red on the front with a large, appetizing image of cooked macaroni in a spicy sauce. The front panel features the Gibs logo, product name, and a '2 in 1 Recipe Mix Sachet Inside' badge, along with a halal certification and serving size. The side panels are blue, displaying nutritional information and a product description, while the back is covered with detailed boiling instructions, ingredients, and directions, all set against a playful background of illustrated vegetables. The box is sealed and appears sturdy, designed to stand upright on shelves. The packaging is visually vibrant, with a mix of English and Urdu text, and is intended to attract attention in a retail or urban grocery setting.
description: A vibrant, upright rectangular box of Gibs Tikka Macaroni Pasta with red and blue panels, detailed labeling, and a photo of cooked pasta on the front.
description_view_0: The front view shows the red face of the box with the Gibs logo, product name, a large image of cooked macaroni, and key product highlights.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a blue panel with the Gibs logo, product name, and a detailed nutritional information table.
description_view_2: The back view features a blue background with illustrated vegetables, boiling instructions, ingredients, and cooking directions.
description_view_3: The right side view shows a blue panel with the Gibs logo, a product description, and several certification logos at the bottom.
attribute_labeling: Front: Gibs logo, 'PASTA Tikka Macaroni Recipe Pack', '2 in 1 Recipe Mix Sachet Inside', Halal symbol, serving size; Sides: nutritional information, product description, certifications; Back: boiling instructions, ingredients, directions, illustrated vegetables.
attribute_product_name: Gibs Pasta Tikka Macaroni Recipe Pack
